forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Partly sunny, with a high near 86. Southwest wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 9pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 61. West wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
This afternoon in Boston, a gentle warmth envelops the city with the promise of scattered rain showers flirtatiously lingering on the edge of the horizon. The sun peeks through a quilt of fluffy clouds, casting a gentle glow across the landscape, while a light southwest wind dances playfully, stirring the air with its soft caress. The atmosphere carries a mild anticipation, as the chance of rain hangs lightly—the kind that nudges you to keep an umbrella close, yet perhaps not necessary for your stroll along the Charles or a chance encounter at your favorite café.

As night approaches, the air will cool, transforming into a soft embrace around 61 degrees. With the possibility of a few fleeting raindrops before 9 PM, the evening holds an invitation for a quaint gathering under the stars where the presence of clouds adds a cozy ambiance. One might find this a perfect opportunity for a leisurely dinner or perhaps to catch up with friends over a glass of wine at a local bistro. Layering yourself with a light sweater against the evening chill and comfortable attire will ensure you're prepared for whatever the night may bring. All in all, it’s a day that balances warmth with a whisper of change, offering a slice of summer infused with a touch of possibility.
